name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Hey sorry I haven't been posting I'm going through a hard time because my little foster siblings are going back to there bio fam after they have been with us for two years and on top of that I just got my period and I literally want to curl in a ball and die so sry for not posting.Ok enough of me rambling let's get to the story!

You put your boyfriend Katsuki's hair in a pony tail !!😂💥
creator: Luna🌙the🌙loaf🌙of🌙bread
